name: Chili Con Pavo
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground turkey OR 1 lb Ground-turkey sausage
1 Fresh jalapeno chili; stemmed, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions: In a 4-5 quart pan over high heat, combine turkey, onion, jalapeno, and oil. Stir often until meat is crumbly and brown, about 20 minutes. Stir in chili powder, green chilies, tomatoes (break up with a spoon) and juices, beans and liquid, cloves, and olives. Simmer uncovered, to blend flavors, about 15 minutes. Serve in bowls; offer toppings to add to taste.
